extracted_content: {"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What are the distinct treatment regimens used in Melanoma trials?","sql":"SELECT DISTINCT \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma';"},{"question":"For Melanoma trials, what is the minimum follow-up duration for the Rx arm by treatment regimen?","sql":"SELECT \"Treatment regimen\", MIN(\"Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx\") FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' GROUP BY \"Treatment regimen\";"},{"question":"For Melanoma trials, what is the minimum follow-up duration for the Control arm by treatment regimen?","sql":"SELECT \"Treatment regimen\", MIN(\"Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control\") FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' GROUP BY \"Treatment regimen\";"},{"question":"For Melanoma trials, what is the minimum follow-up duration for Overall by treatment regimen?","sql":"SELECT \"Treatment regimen\", MIN(\"Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall\") FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' GROUP BY \"Treatment regimen\";"},{"question":"For Melanoma trials, which authors have minimum follow-up?","sql":"SELECT \"Author\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Type of follow-up given\" = 'Minimum';"}]}

extracted_content: {"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What are the Phase 3 trials for prostate cancer?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Prostate' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3';"},{"question":"Which Phase 3 prostate cancer trials compared immunotherapy to chemotherapy plus anti-EGFR therapy?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\", \"Control regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Prostate' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Name of ICI\" IS NOT NULL AND \"Control regimen\" LIKE '%chemotherapy%' AND \"Control regimen\" LIKE '%anti-EGFR%';"}]}

message.content: {"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What are the Phase 3 trials for prostate cancer?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Prostate' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3';"},{"question":"Which Phase 3 prostate cancer trials compared immunotherapy to chemotherapy plus anti-EGFR therapy?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\", \"Control regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Prostate' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Name of ICI\" IS NOT NULL AND \"Control regimen\" LIKE '%chemotherapy%' AND \"Control regimen\" LIKE '%anti-EGFR%';"}]}

extracted_content: {"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"Phase 3 trials for Esophageal/GEJ cancer.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3';"},{"question":"Phase 3 esophageal/GEJ trials with an immunotherapy agent.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Name of ICI\" IS NOT NULL;"},{"question":"Among those, trials that compare immunotherapy to a vaccine.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Name of ICI\" IS NOT NULL AND (\"Type of control\" = 'Vaccine' OR \"Control arm\" LIKE '%vaccine%');"},{"question":"Exclude trials with chemotherapy as the control arm among the immunotherapy-vaccine Phase 3 esophageal/GEJ trials.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Name of ICI\" IS NOT NULL AND (\"Type of control\" = 'Vaccine' OR \"Control arm\" LIKE '%vaccine%') AND (\"Type of control\" NOT LIKE '%chemotherapy%' AND \"Control arm\" NOT LIKE '%chemotherapy%');"}]}

message.content: {"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"Phase 3 trials for Esophageal/GEJ cancer.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3';"},{"question":"Phase 3 esophageal/GEJ trials with an immunotherapy agent.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Name of ICI\" IS NOT NULL;"},{"question":"Among those, trials that compare immunotherapy to a vaccine.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Name of ICI\" IS NOT NULL AND (\"Type of control\" = 'Vaccine' OR \"Control arm\" LIKE '%vaccine%');"},{"question":"Exclude trials with chemotherapy as the control arm among the immunotherapy-vaccine Phase 3 esophageal/GEJ trials.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Name of ICI\" IS NOT NULL AND (\"Type of control\" = 'Vaccine' OR \"Control arm\" LIKE '%vaccine%') AND (\"Type of control\" NOT LIKE '%chemotherapy%' AND \"Control arm\" NOT LIKE '%chemotherapy%');"}]}

extracted_content: {"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What trials have Name of ICI equal to Tremelimumab?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Monotherapy/combination\", \"Cancer type\", \"Type of combination\", \"Trial phase\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Name of ICI\" = 'Tremelimumab';"},{"question":"Among Tremelimumab trials, which have Monotherapy/combination = Combination?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Monotherapy/combination\", \"Cancer type\", \"Type of combination\", \"Trial phase\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Name of ICI\" = 'Tremelimumab' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination';"},{"question":"Among Tremelimumab combination trials, which have Cancer type = Non-Small Cell Lung?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Monotherapy/combination\", \"Cancer type\", \"Type of combination\", \"Trial phase\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Name of ICI\" = 'Tremelimumab' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung';"},{"question":"What is the Type of combination used in Tremelimumab combination trials for Non-Small Cell Lung cancer?","sql":"SELECT \"Type of combination\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Name of ICI\" = 'Tremelimumab' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung';"}]}
